item.title: Version 1.0.0 — Stay in flow. Talk anywhere you type.
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.0.0

Stay in flow. Talk anywhere you type.

Thinking is fast. Typing is slow. Abalone Flow puts your voice where your fingers used to be — hold a key, speak, release. Your words appear at the cursor in any app on your Mac.

Why people use it

  • Faster than typing. Words appear while you speak them, not after.
  • Private by design. Everything runs on your Mac. Nothing uploads, ever.
  • Free. No caps. No weekly word limits. No subscription. No account.
  • Near-perfect accuracy. ~97% on clean English, with punctuation and capitalization. We transcribe what you said, not what an AI thinks you meant.
  • Everywhere you type. Claude Code, Cursor, Mail, Slack, Obsidian, Linear, Notion.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon recommended.
